creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Maybe it's guessing the triple incorrectly?  Base clang might be using a different triple by default.

Can you please run the same commands with -v and show the output?  E.g, run:

/usr/bin/clang++ -v -c hello.cpp

and

/usr/local/bin/clang++39 -v -c hello.cpp

Then post the full output here.
